input.question: A coat is reduced by 30%, then a further 15% off the already-reduced price. After that, 8% VAT is added on the discounted price. The customer pays exactly €92.43. What was the ORIGINAL price in euros, to two decimals?

On an island where knights always tell the truth and knaves always lie, you meet three islanders A, B, and C.
A says: 'B is a knave.'
B says: 'A and C are the same type.'
C says: 'A is a knight.'
What is A? Answer with one word: knight or knave.
How many distinct arrangements of the letters in the word MOOVY are there in which the two O's are NOT adjacent to each other? Give the answer as a single integer.

A game show has three doors. Behind one is a prize, the other two hide goats. You pick door 1. The host, who knows where the prize is, then opens door 3 to reveal a goat, and offers you the chance to switch to door 2. What is the probability of winning the prize if you switch? Express as a simple fraction in the form a/b.

A cube has a volume of 343 cubic centimeters. A sphere is inscribed inside the cube so that it touches all six faces. What is the surface area of the sphere in square centimeters, rounded to two decimals? Use π = 3.14159.
What is the next number in this sequence? 1, 11, 21, 1211, 111221, ?
Anna is currently 3 times Ben's age. In 12 years, Anna will be exactly twice Ben's age. How old is Ben now (in years)?

Three friends — Alice, Bob, and Carol — each drink a different beverage from {coffee, tea, water}. Alice does not drink coffee. Bob drinks something hot (and water is cold). Carol drinks neither coffee nor water. Who drinks coffee? Answer with one name.

Two cars start at the same time from cities A and B, which are 240 km apart, and drive toward each other. Car A moves at a constant 60 km/h. Car B starts at 80 km/h but, after 1 hour, reduces its speed to 40 km/h. How many hours after the start do they meet? Give the answer as a number.
Jos 31. tammikuuta 2024 oli keskiviikko, mikä viikonpäivä oli 1. maaliskuuta 2025? Huomaa: 2024 oli karkausvuosi. Anna vastaus suomeksi pienellä kirjaimella (esim. 'maanantai').
